title: 精简异步 ypi_studio_subagent 返回上下文

subagents.prompt: 请为“精简异步 ypi_studio_subagent 返回上下文”做技术设计。重点阅读 docs/modules/library.md、docs/modules/frontend.md、lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts 中 ypi_studio_subagent/ypi_studio_wait 的返回投影、components/YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.tsx、components/YpiStudioWaitPanel.…
subagents.summary:
已完成规划与技术设计（仅文档，无生产代码改动）。

## 产出/修改文件

- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/prd.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/design.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/implement.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/checks.md`

## 核心设计决策

- `ypi_studio_subagent(action=start, mode=async)` 改为极轻量 projection：仅保留 task identity、runId/id、member、model/thinking、status、title、wait hint。
- async start 不再继续接收 child runner 后续 `onUpdate`；进展由 `ypi_studio_wait` 承接。
- `poll/collect/cancel` 同步改为轻量 lifecycle projection，避免 wait 后 collect 再次注入厚上下文。
- `ypi_studio_wait` 保持 compact，仅建议补 `id: runId`/`taskKey` 小兼容字段。
- UI 需兼容 `run.id ?? run.runId`，并显示 task/subtask title。

## Validation

- 已验证 `implement.md` 中 fenced `json ypi-implementation-plan` 可解析，包含 5 个子任务。
- 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，因为本轮仅规划文档，无代码实现。

## 剩余风险 / 主会话需确认

- 请确认是否接受“async child 后续 progress 不再注入 start tool，只通过 wait/session widget 观察”的取舍。
- 请由主 session 保存 `implement.md` 中 implementationPlan，并按流程进入 `awaiting_approval` 等待用户确认后再实现。

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "command": "python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re,json
p=Path('.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/implement.md')
s=p.read_text()
m=re.search(r'```json ypi-implementation-plan\n(.*?)\n```',s,re.S)
assert m, 'no plan block'
obj=json.loads(m.group(1))
assert obj['subtasks'] and all('id' in x for x in obj['subtasks'])
print('implementation plan json ok:', len(obj['subtasks']), 'subtasks')
PY",
  "timeout": 10
}

subagents.prompt: 请实现子任务 ui-runid-title-compat：补齐 UI 对轻量 runId/title 投影的兼容。遵循任务 artifacts 中的设计与实现计划，确保 Chat/Studio 面板仍能展示 run id、member、状态、标题/摘要，并能通过 runId 继续 poll/collect/wait。完成后汇报变更文件、验证结果和注意事项。
subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.tsx` — added `runId` fallback, `taskTitle`/`subtaskTitle` normalization, and title-aware header/meta display.
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — Studio live overlay now reads `run.id ?? run.runId ?? args.runId` and carries task/subtask titles.
- `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` — uses subtask/task title as live overlay summary fallback.
- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — added optional `taskTitle` / `subtaskTitle` to `YpiStudioLiveRunOverlay`.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md` — updated handoff artifact.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- `YpiStudioWaitPanel.tsx` already supports `runId`/`id` and task/subtask title fields; no code change needed.
- Lightweight async-start cards without transcript metadata now degrade to title/status/model/runId display; progress remains via `ypi_studio_wait`.

#### Decisions Needed

- None.

itemsPreview.text:
# Handoff — lifecycle-actions-light-result

## Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — wired `ypi_studio_subagent(action=poll|collect)` to `ypi_studio_subagent_lifecycle_v1` with task identity plus lifecycle run projections, skipping transcript preview reads.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — wired `ypi_studio_subagent(action=cancel)` to the same lightweight lifecycle projection, preserving idempotent abort/cancel behavior and returning short cancel reason/run status.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — added terminal `collect` nextRecommendedAction while avoiding thick task compact, transcriptPreview, progress.itemsPreview, implementationProjection, events, artifacts, and subagents in lifecycle details.

## Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

## Notes / Risks

- Lifecycle `run.transcript` still returns only transcript ref metadata so debug/API entry points remain available without injecting transcript preview content.
- Existing uncommitted changes from earlier subtasks remain in `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`; this handoff covers only lifecycle poll/collect/cancel wiring.

## Decisions Needed

- None.

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md",
  "content": "# Handoff — ui-runid-title-compat

## Files Changed

- `components/YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.tsx` — normalized `run.id ?? run.runId`, added `taskTitle`/`subtaskTitle` parsing and task-title display fallbacks for the subagent card header/meta.
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — live Studio overlays now read `run.id ?? run.runId ?? args.runId` and include task/subtask title fields in the overlay signature/payload.
- `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` — live overlay rows can use subtask/task title as summary fallback when progress preview is absent.
- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — extended `YpiStudioLiveRunOverlay` with optional `taskTitle` and `subtaskTitle`.

## Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

## Notes / Risks

- `components/YpiStudioWaitPanel.tsx` already accepted `runId`/`id` and task/subtask titles, so no code change was needed there.
- Full transcript/debug fetching still requires transcript metadata and cwd; lightweight async-start cards without transcript ref degrade to title/status/model/runId display and wait remains the progress path.

## Decisions Needed

- None.
"
}

 | `components/AppShell.tsx` | Top-level layout, URL state, active Project Registry space context, browser tab title as `Project(Space)`, tab management, Web Terminal bottom-dock toggling, resizable left drawer, right drawer mode switching between files and optional Trellis tasks, Trellis-task-to-chat context block insertion, and session-scoped Studio widget polling that stays fast while implementation subtasks are running, waiting, or need attention. |
 | `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` | Project Registry-driven project/space tree sidebar. It loads projects from `/api/projects` instead of synthesizing them from sessions, lazy-loads linked sessions for the selected project space, hides YPI Studio child audit sessions from ordinary root history by default while showing them as nested Studio audit rows under visible parents, shows exact-cwd legacy unassigned sessions separately, registers new project paths from manual input or the local OS directory picker, provides minimal project/space metadata editing for display name, tags, pinned, and archive state, keeps WorkTree actions available for worktree spaces, and includes archive/unarchive actions plus the integrated file explorer with a resizable session/explorer split. Main spaces without a custom display name render as `主空间` while keeping `spaceId: "main"`; the selected space header subtitle shows `空间：...` plus the current Git branch or WorkTree branch/base status, appends path-missing state when needed, and keeps full path/status details in the hover/focus tooltip. WorkTree badges remain compact (`WT` plus branch) with a tooltip for branch and base/unknown state. |
 | `components/Checkbox.tsx` | Shared theme-aware checkbox control with custom focus, hover, checked visuals, optional label text, and native input semantics. |
-| `components/ChatWindow.tsx` | Message list, SSE streaming, fork/navigate logic. Shows archived banner and disables input for archived sessions, treats opened YPI Studio child sessions as read-only audit views, wires the effective session id and optional project/space context for precreated empty sessions into chat input controls, and reports compact YPI Studio tool live-progress overlays, including created/bound task ids/keys, phase/tokens/tps/current tool, recent preview changes, and display-limit flags, to `AppShell` for the session widget. Global Studio background/waiting state is shown by the floating `YpiStudioSessionWidget`, not a fixed card inside the chat scroll. |
+| `components/ChatWindow.tsx` | Message list, SSE streaming, fork/navigate logic. Shows archived banner and disables input for archived sessions, treats opened YPI Studio child sessions as read-only audit views, wires the effective session id and optional project/space context for precreated empty sessions into chat input controls, and reports compact YPI Studio tool live-progress overlays, including created/bound task ids/keys, `run.id ?? run.runId` fallback, task/subtask titles, phase/tokens/tps/current tool, recent preview changes, and display-limit flags, to `AppShell` for the session widget. Global Studio background/waiting state is shown by the floating `YpiStudioSessionWidget`, not a fixed card inside the chat scroll. |
 | `components/ChatInput.tsx` | Input bar, model dropdown, thinking level, tool preset, image upload, Browser Share binding entry, file-reference chips, slash-command autocomplete for extension commands/skills/prompt templates, and…

implementationPlan.summary: 为 ypi_studio_subagent(action=start, mode=async) 建立极轻量启动投影，poll/collect/cancel 使用轻量 lifecycle 投影，wait 保持 compact，并补齐 UI 对 runId/title 的兼容。

subtasks.title: 建立 Studio subagent 轻量投影辅助函数
instructions: 新增 task identity helper，仅返回 id/key/title/status/workflowId。
新增 async start run projection helper，同时输出 id 与 runId，包含 taskId/taskKey/taskTitle/subtaskTitle/member/status/model/thinking/modelSource/thinkingSource/runner/startedAt/极短 progress。
新增 lifecycle run projection helper，用于 poll/collect/cancel，包含短 summary/error、terminal transcript ref metadata，但不包含 transcriptPreview/progress.itemsPreview/requestAffinity/policy。
为 projectSubagentRun 增加 options（例如 includeTranscriptPreview），默认保持旧行为；wait 和轻量 lifecycle 路径传 false，避免无用读取 transcript preview。
为 compactSubagentRunForWait 增加 id: runId 和 taskKey 小字段，保持 wait payload compact。
acceptance: 轻量 task helper 不返回 artifacts/events/subagents/implementationProjection/readHints。
async start helper 不返回 prompt/transcript/transcriptPreview/progress.itemsPreview/full policy/requestAffinity。
原同步路径调用 compactSubagentRunProjection 的行为保持可用。
risks: helper 默认参数若设置错误可能影响同步 start 的 debug 展示；默认应保持 includeTranscriptPreview=true。

subtasks.title: 将 async start final result 与启动 onUpdate 改为极轻量投影
instructions: 在 mode === async 的初始 onUpdate 中使用 task identity + async start run projection；sync 模式保留原 onUpdate。
启动 child runner 时，async 模式不要把原始 onUpdate 继续传入 SDK/CLI child runner；只保留 persistence callbacks 写 task/transcript/runtime registry。
async final result details 使用 projection=ypi_studio_subagent_async_start_v1、task identity、async start run projection、wait hint（tool/taskId/taskKey/runId/runIds/until/recommended）。
warnings 仅保留短字符串数组；不注入 policy diagnostics 对象。
content 文本保持短启动确认，并明确建议调用 ypi_studio_wait(runId=...)。
acceptance: async start details 不再包含 compactYpiStudioTaskForTool 输出。
async start details.run 不包含 transcriptPreview/progress.itemsPreview/prompt/full policy。
async child 后续进展仍写入 task.json/transcript，并可被 ypi_studio_wait 读取。
risks: 如果编排模型未调用 wait，start 卡片不会继续更新；通过 wait prompt guideline、session widget polling 和 terminal continuation 缓解。

subtasks.title: 精简 poll/collect/cancel 工具结果
instructions: poll/collect 路径把 details.task 从 compactYpiStudioTaskForTool 改为 task identity。
poll/collect/cancel 的 details.runs/run 使用 lifecycle projection。
collect 在所有 requested runs terminal 时可返回短 nextRecommendedAction，便于未使用 wait 的旧编排继续；不要返回完整 task compact。
cancel 保持幂等取消语义，返回取消后的轻量 run 状态和短 error/terminationReason。
wait 路径调用 projectSubagentRun 时跳过 transcriptPreview 读取，并保持 compactSubagentRunForWait 输出小。
acceptance: collect terminal 仍能看到 run status、member、summary/error、terminationReason、startedAt/finishedAt。
wait 返回结构仍被 YpiStudioWaitPanel 正常解析。
risks: 旧调试习惯可能依赖 collect 的 transcriptPreview；保留 transcript ref metadata，并通过 transcript API 获取完整内容。

subtasks.title: 补齐 UI 对轻量 runId/title 投影的兼容
instructions: YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.normalizeRun 使用 id ?? runId，增加 taskTitle/subtaskTitle 字段读取。
Subagent header/meta 显示 subtaskTitle ?? taskTitle ?? taskId，确保轻量 start 卡片有标题。
ChatWindow live overlay runId 读取改为 run.id ?? run.runId ?? progress.args.runId；如扩展 overlay type，加入 taskTitle/subtaskTitle 可选字段。
确认缺失 transcript、progress.itemsPreview、policy 时组件只降级展示，不报错。
YpiStudioWaitPanel 只需确认兼容；如 wait run 增加 id/taskKey，不破坏现有 runId 解析。
acceptance: async start 卡片至少展示 member/status/model/thinking/runId/title。
ChatWindow overlay 能从轻量 details 提取 runId/member/model/thinking/status。
wait 卡片继续显示 task title、run status、phase/current tool/tps/summary。
risks: 新增 title 字段若只在 run projection 中提供，旧 result 不显示标题；应保持 taskId fallback。

subtasks.title: 更新模块文档并完成验证
instructions: 更新 library 文档中 ypi-studio-extension 描述：async start light projection、poll/collect/cancel lifecycle projection、wait compact、async child progress 由 wait 承接。
更新 frontend 文档中 YpiStudioSubagentTranscript/ChatWindow/YpiStudioWaitPanel 对轻量字段和 runId/title 兼容的描述。
运行 lint 与 TypeScript 检查。
人工检查 diff，确认没有生产代码外的无关改动。
risks: 文档若未同步，后续 agent 可能重新引入厚投影；需明确字段边界。

light-projection-helpers.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — Added lightweight task/run projection helpers, `projectSubagentRun` options with default transcript preview compatibility, model/thinking fields, and wait projection `id`/`taskKey`.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md` — Wrote handoff artifact.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Only completed `light-projection-helpers` boundary.
- New async-start and lifecycle helpers are ready but not yet wired into `start/poll/collect/cancel`; follow-up subtasks should do that.
- `projectSubagentRun()` defaults to `includeTranscriptPreview: true` to preserve current sync/debug behavior.

async-start-light-result.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — async start `onUpdate` and final result now use lightweight `ypi_studio_subagent_async_start_v1` details with task identity, run identity/model/thinking/member/status/title, and wait hint.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — async child SDK/CLI runners no longer receive parent tool `onUpdate`; persistence callbacks remain intact for task/transcript/runtime updates and `ypi_studio_wait`.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md` — updated handoff artifact.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.
  - ESLint reported one warning: `compactSubagentRunForLifecycle` is unused; this is expected until the later lifecycle subtask wires poll/collect/cancel.

#### Notes / Risks

- Sync start behavior remains on the existing projection path.
- Poll/collect/cancel are intentionally not changed in this subtask.

lifecycle-actions-light-result.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — `poll` / `collect` / `cancel` now return lightweight lifecycle projections:
  - task identity only
  - compact run status/model/thinking/progress/summary/error
  - no `implementationProjection`, `events`, `artifacts`, `subagents`, `transcriptPreview`, or `progress.itemsPreview`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md` — updated handoff for this subtask.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- `run.transcript` remains as metadata ref only for debug/API access; transcript preview content is not injected.
- Existing earlier-subtask changes remain in `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`; this implementation only wires lifecycle `poll/collect/cancel`.

#### Decisions Needed

- None.

- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — Studio live overlay now reads `run.id ?? run.runId ?? args.runId` and carries task/subtask titles.
- `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` — uses subtask/task title as live overlay summary fallback.
- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — added optional `taskTitle` / `subtaskTitle` to `YpiStudioLiveRunOverlay`.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-143502-精简异步-ypi_studio_subagent-返回上下文/handoff.md` — updated handoff artifact.
